THE COURT, HAVING CONSIDERED ORAL AND WRITTEN ARGUMENT BY THE PARTIES, HEREBY FINDS THAT THE DEC. 3, 2001 DECISION OF THE BOARD OF NURSING IS SUPPORTED BY THE WEIGHT OF EVIDENCE, AND DENIES THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. SO ORDERED.
